subject: Re: Remove bad tilts in WarpTools
body:
Run the unselect job type to deselect bad tilts

Best,
Pranav
--
Pranav Shah
Postdoctoral Research Fellow.

Division of Structural Biology,
Wellcome Trust Centre for Human Genetics,
University of Oxford,
Roosevelt Drive, Oxford OX3 7BN,
UK

> Hi all,
>
> Is there a way (or a napari tool) to remove the bad tilts before tomo
> reconstruction using  similar to the way one would do this in the warp-GUI
> or relion 5?
>
> Cheers,
> Lorenz
